heading: Amendments to orders
label: 3416 Amendments to orders
text: The provisions of this chapter applicable to orders shall be applicable to amendments to orders.
notes: Effective DateSection effective , see , set out as an Effective Date of 1977 Amendment note under .Oct. 1, 1977section 1901 of Pub. L. 95–113section 1307 of this title
